response.overview: FAST WAY NOWHERE uncovers the teenage world Filmed in beautitul Eastman color in an upper midwestern setting. It takes a bold look Into the Life and Times of Today's Teens! of deceit with stunning truth. From the spinning wheels of motor bikes in a daring, near disastrous race of initiation to tragic death at the hands of party crashers, this dramatic new color motion picture tells the story of the short-circuited morality of tho lively ones.
response.title: Fast Way Nowhere
